notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.6. It addresses 11 CVEs: CVE-2025-40135, CVE-2025-40158, CVE-2025-40170, CVE-2026-31408, CVE-2025-68183, and 6 more.
notes.title: Description
